MTN FOR PERMISSION TO SUBMIT FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYON, RAMONA HEARING SET FOR APR-02-2024 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APRIL-02-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF RAMONA MAYON'S MTN FOR PERMISSION TO SUBMIT FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AND PROOF OF SERVICE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF/PETITIONER'S "MOTION FOR PERMISSION TO SUBMIT FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT" IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO COPY OF THE PROPOSED AMENDED COMPLAINT WAS FILED, AND THE CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT ARE VIOLATED IN SEVERAL OTHER WAYS AS WELL. (SEE OPP. 4:1-5:23). ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Mtn For Permission To Submit First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-02-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF RAMONA MAYON's Mtn For Permission To Submit First Amended Complaint And Proof Of Service.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff/petitioner's "motion for permission to submit first amended complaint" is denied without prejudice. No copy of the proposed amended complaint was filed, and the California Rules of Court are violated in several other ways as well. (See Opp. 4:1-5:23.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Motion To Supplement Original Pleading Under Ccp 464-45
Off Calendar Aug-22-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RAMONA MAYON's Motion To Supplement Original Pleading Under CCP 464-45 is Off calendar as untimely pursuant to CCP 1005.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2021 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Ramona Mayon'S Ex Parte Application For Temporary Restraining Order And Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPERANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Petitioner RAMONA MAYON (Email: ramonamayon@yahoo.com) in pro per;
Atty. JEREMY M. GOLDMAN, Esq. of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Email: jeremy.goldman@sfcityatty.org; Tel: 415-554-6762) for Respondent City and County of San Francisco.

Hearing Re: Petitioner Ramona Mayon's Ex Parte Application For Temporary Restraining Order And Order To Show Cause.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court rules as follows: Petitioner's ex parte application for a temporary restraining order and order to show cause is denied.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
